project: Forced Migration: Visualizing Global Refugee Flows
data_contract: Shiny app reads cleaned/chart-ready outputs only; raw CSV files are not loaded by the app.
preferred_format: parquet if present, csv fallback included
methodology_notes: Graph 5 and Graph 6 use population stock from cleaned time_series data.
Asylum seeker datasets are flow datasets and support application/decision/corridor views.
IDPs are excluded from the default cross-border host-country ranking because they are internal displacement.
NaN/inf values are sanitized before Plotly widgets are returned to Shiny.
runtime_data_source: outputs/03_chart_data/stock.parquet is preferred; outputs/01_clean/time_series_clean.csv.gz is fallback only.
